title: Sigma Detection Rule Regression Info
description: Schema for info.yml files in regression_data/ that describe regression test cases for Sigma rules.

id.description: Unique identifier for this regression test info file (UUID).

description.description: Description of the regression test info.

date.description: Date of creation or last update (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD).

author.description: Author of the regression test info.

rule_metadata.description: Optional metadata about the associated Sigma rule(s).

id.description: UUID of the associated Sigma rule.

title.description: Title of the associated Sigma rule.

regression_tests_info.description: List of regression test cases for the associated Sigma rule.

name.description: Human-readable name for this test case.

match_count.description: Expected number of detections. If not specified, any positive detection is considered a pass.

path.description: Path to the test data file, relative to the repository root.
